---
title: "Ryan Horn"
about:
  template: jolla # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryanhorn15/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/ryan_horn15/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rhorn15/rhorn15.github.io
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Ryan Horn Resume.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rmh14@geneseo.edu

---

*Data Analytics student at SUNY Geneseo with experience spanning military service, electrical systems work, and applied analytics. I am interested in using data to solve real-world problems, communicate clear insights, and keep building technical skills in R, Git, visualization, and statistical thinking. My background in the U.S. Army has strengthened my leadership, adaptability, teamwork, and ability to perform under pressure.*

## Education

**SUNY Geneseo**  
Bachelor of Science in Data Analytics, expected May 2026  
Geneseo, NY

## Experience

**U.S. Army National Guard**  
*Infantryman | July 2020 - Present*

- Developed leadership and teamwork through rigorous training and operational deployments.
- Strengthened strategic planning, adaptability, and problem-solving in high-pressure environments.

**Tambe Electric**  
*Low Voltage Electrician | September 2018 - August 2020*

- Installed and maintained low-voltage systems for communication, security, and audio-visual components.
- Applied wiring, configuration, and troubleshooting skills to deliver reliable low-voltage solutions.

## Skills

**Analytics and Programming:** Data Analysis, R, RStudio, Git, Visualization  
**Tools:** Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Office, PowerPoint, Word  
**Professional Strengths:** Leadership, Communication, Analytical Thinking, Adaptability, Problem Solving, Time Management, Teamwork
